item.gl_vehicles.tooltip.lore_engine_tdi: §8"The only thing that will survive the apocalypse besides cockroaches."
item.gl_vehicles.tooltip.lore_engine_spo: §8"High-revving symphony of pure speed and questionable reliability."
item.gl_vehicles.tooltip.lore_offroad_wh: §8"Vibrates your brain out on asphalt, but absolute kings in the mud."
item.gl_vehicles.tooltip.lore_racing_whe: §8"Turns corners like a razor, as long as you stay away from the grass."
item.gl_vehicles.tooltip.lore_wrench: §8"Sometimes, percussive maintenance is the only way."
item.gl_vehicles.tooltip.lore_fuel_can: §8"Stops you from being a very expensive lawn ornament."
item.gl_vehicles.tooltip.lore_harvester: §8"Speed and power! Harvesting crops like a mechanical god."
item.gl_vehicles.tooltip.lore_seeder: §8"Planting the future at 80 kilometers per hour."
